raw_text: aelfrice is an injection-time memory system for Claude Code; it ingests project facts, locks user-asserted rules, and reranks them per turn.
note: factual default; no requirement / preference / correction keywords.

raw_text: The CLI exposes lock, search, status, doctor, onboard, feedback, promote, unlock, tail, reason, and wonder subcommands.
note: factual default; long enumeration tests classifier on listy text.

raw_text: Per-project DBs replaced the global brain.db file in v1.1; each project's beliefs live under .git/aelfrice/.
Beliefs must always have a non-empty content_hash so deduplication on insert is consistent.
Contributors prefer atomic commits with conventional-commit prefixes over batched diffs.
The regex correction-detector rarely produces CONTRADICTS edges from natural-language disagreements.
note: factual default; documents a known limitation.

raw_text: The v2.x replay-equality probe must report mismatched and derived_orphan as zero before the canonical-store flip is allowed to ship.
note: requirement 'must' on the very contract this corpus probes.

raw_text: Locked beliefs surface in every retrieval and are never demoted automatically by the Bayesian feedback path.
BFS multi-hop retrieval expands seed beliefs along typed edges weighted per edge type.
note: factual default; describes shipped retrieval lane.

raw_text: Determinism is a hard requirement; classification and ranking must produce identical output for identical input on every host.
